hero.title: We help your business
hero.subtitle: Concrete solutions built for your reality. No technical jargon — just measurable results.

tech_label: See the technical tools we use

data_bi.title: Dashboards & Business Tracking
data_bi.tagline: Stop making decisions blind. See your business in real time.
data_bi.description: Are you spending hours compiling spreadsheets, calling your team to check on sales, or waiting for month-end to know if you're profitable? We build a custom dashboard that centralizes all your key information — sales, inventory, cash flow, customers — accessible from your phone at a glance.
features: One screen to see the state of your business in real time
Your key figures updated automatically, without manual re-entry
Instant alerts when a critical threshold is reached (low stock, overdue payment, sales drop)
Weekly or monthly reports generated automatically
Accessible from your phone, tablet or computer
data_bi.result: Our clients recover an average of 5 to 10 hours per week by eliminating manual reporting.

dev.title: Website & Business Application
dev.tagline: Your professional online presence or your management tool, built for you.
dev.description: You don't have a professional website, or you're running your business with notebooks and spreadsheets? We build websites that inspire trust in your clients, and business applications that replace your improvised tools — deliveries, orders, invoicing, staff management — with a solution designed for your reality.
features: Professional website visible on Google, optimized for mobile
Custom management application (orders, invoicing, inventory, HR)
Simple, clear interface — no technical knowledge required
Full team training included with every project
Hosting, maintenance and updates handled for you
dev.result: A transport company replaced their paper folders with an app: zero invoicing errors, deliveries tracked in real time.

analytics.title: Digital Presence & Visibility
analytics.tagline: Your customers are searching for you online. Are you where they look?
analytics.description: Today, a customer who can't find you online chooses a competitor. We build and manage your digital presence — Google listing, social media, targeted ads — so the right customers find you, without you having to manage everything yourself.
features: Creation and optimization of your Google Business listing (appear in local searches)
Social media management (Facebook, Instagram, LinkedIn)
Targeted ads to reach your ideal customers in your service area
Clear monthly report: how many people saw, contacted, and visited you
Content strategy tailored to your sector and budget
analytics.result: A Dakar restaurant tripled its online bookings in 4 months through our local visibility strategy.

automation.title: Time Savings & Automation
automation.tagline: What you do by hand every week can be done automatically.
automation.description: Customer follow-ups, invoice sending, inventory updates, weekly reports… These repetitive tasks drain your time and generate errors. We identify the friction points in your organization and set up automations that do the work for you — even while you sleep.
features: Audit of time-consuming and repetitive tasks in your organization
Automatic follow-up for overdue customer payments
Automatic sending of invoices, receipts and order confirmations
Synchronization between your tools (WhatsApp, email, inventory management)
Gradual setup that doesn't disrupt your current operations
automation.result: A distribution company saved 20 hours of work per week by automating their follow-ups and delivery reports.

ai.title: Artificial Intelligence & Assistants
ai.tagline: AI is not just for large companies. It's for you, right now.
ai.description: An assistant available 24/7 to answer your clients on WhatsApp, a tool that anticipates your stock shortages, a system that detects anomalies in your sales… AI allows your business to do more with the same team. We guide you step by step, with solutions adapted to your size and your budget.
features: WhatsApp or web assistant to answer clients at any hour, without hiring
Sales forecasting tool and stock need anticipation
Automatic anomaly detection (fraud, error, abnormal revenue drop)
AI assistant to draft your quotes, letters and reports faster
Training your teams to use AI in their daily work
ai.result: A retail shop now handles 70% of customer requests automatically via WhatsApp — without hiring an additional person.

items.q: Are your solutions adapted to an SME budget?
items.a: Yes. We work with businesses of all sizes, including very small companies with modest budgets. We always start by understanding your priorities and your investment capacity to propose a progressive solution — you only pay for what is useful to you. We can also arrange payment in installments.

items.q: How long does it take to see the first results?
items.a: For a dashboard or a simple automation, you see results within the first 2 to 4 weeks. For a website or an application, the timeline varies between 4 and 12 weeks depending on complexity. We establish a precise schedule at the start of every project.

items.q: Do I need any technical knowledge?
items.a: No, none at all. We design all our solutions for non-technical users. Every delivery includes full training for you and your team. We also remain available after delivery to support you.

items.q: What happens after the project is delivered?
items.a: We don't disappear after delivery. Depending on your project, we offer a monthly maintenance contract that includes fixes, updates and fast support. You can also contact us on an ad-hoc basis to evolve your solution.

items.q: Do you work with companies from all sectors?
items.a: Yes. We have worked with businesses in retail, logistics, food service, agriculture, financial services, and many others. Our approach always adapts to your industry and your specific constraints.

cta.title: You have a concrete problem?
cta.subtitle: First call is free. We analyze your situation and propose a solution adapted to your budget — with no commitment.
cta.no_commitment: First call 100% free and with no commitment
